title: Deployment
description: Represents a software deployment event including version, environment, strategy, and outcome.

application.description: Identifier of the application being deployed.

version.description: Version or artifact tag being deployed, e.g., '2.4.1' or 'sha-abc123'.

triggeredBy.description: User or automated system that triggered the deployment.

pipeline.description: CI/CD pipeline identifier that produced this deployment.

commit.description: Git commit SHA associated with this deployment.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the deployment completed or failed.

rollbackOf.description: Identifier of the failed deployment this was a rollback of, if applicable.

healthCheckUrl.description: URL used to verify deployment health after rollout.
